---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the framework, tests, tooling, CI, Docker, or security posture
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Problem or motivation
What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the desired behavior or implementation direction.

## Alternatives considered
List alternative approaches you considered.

## Expected benefit
Explain the expected outcome and why it matters.

## Impact on tests, rules, CI, Docker, compatibility, or security
Describe expected effects on:
- Test cases and expected results
- Rules and rule materialization
- CI/build workflows
- Docker/runtime reproducibility
- Connector compatibility
- Security/hardening
